questions.question:
다음 중 밑줄 친 단어의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Students are usually quiet in the library.

다음 중 밑줄 친 두 단어의 의미 관계와 다른 것은?
I feel so cold. I need some hot water.

다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
My math teacher 	so smart.

다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
Amy has one brother, 	he is seven years old.

다음 중 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : Harry, 	you do me a favor?
B : Sure. What is it?

다음 중 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : What are you going to do this weekend?
B : I’m going to go hiking. Do you want to come with
me?
A : 	.

다음 중 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
◦ She wants to 	her son.
◦ I am so sorry. I missed your 	.
다음은 John의 주중 계획표이다. 화요일에 할 일은?

그림으로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What is the girl doing?
B : She is 	.

다음 대화가 끝난 후 두 사람이 함께 할 일은?
A : Oh, no! The dance contest is tomorrow.
B : Is there anything I can do to help?
A : Can you help me practice dancing?
B : Sure. Let’s go practice together.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Did you enjoy the magic show?
B : Yes, 	. How about you?
A : I also enjoyed it. The tricks were amazing.
choices: ② we had a boring time
④ I played baseball with my friends

questions.question:
다음 대화의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Are you ready for the trip tomorrow?
B : Yes. I packed everything, but I don’t have a fan.
A : Don’t worry. I’ll bring one for you.
다음 홍보문을 보고 행사에 대해 알 수 없는 것은?

다음 방송의 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Attention, shoppers! We have a special event for our
customers this week. If you spend over $ 50, you will
get a 5% discount. Thank you for shopping with us.
다음 대화에서 A가 학교 콘서트에 가고 싶어 하는 이유는?

다음 Forest Adventures에 대한 설명과 일치하지 않는 것은?
The book, Forest Adventures, was written by the
famous writer, Anna Brown. The main characters are a
girl and a puppy. The book tells a story about their
friendship. You can buy it in bookstores in October.
choices: ③ 우정에 관한 이야기를 담고 있다.

questions.question:
다음 글에서 The Pig Festival에 대해 언급된 내용이 아닌
것은?
The Pig Festival is the biggest celebration in my town.
Last year, 5,500 people visited the festival. Its main
events are a pig race and a fireworks show. People can
buy delicious food like hot dogs and cotton candy.
questions.passage: The Pig Festival is the biggest celebration in my town. Last year, 5,500 people visited the festival. Its main events are a pig race and a fireworks show. People can buy delicious food like hot dogs and cotton candy.

questions.question:
다음 글에서 Jiho가 제안한 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
I’m worried because I often buy things that I don’t
need. 	So, 	I 	asked 	my 	friend, 	Jiho, 	for 	advice. 	He
suggested making a list of things to buy. I think this is
a really good idea.
questions.passage: I'm worried because I often buy things that I don't need. So, I asked my friend, Jiho, for advice. He suggested making a list of things to buy. I think this is a really good idea.

questions.question:
그래프로 보아 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
The students in my class like 	the most.

다음 글의 흐름으로 보아 어울리지 않는 문장은?
These days, robots play many different roles. ① Some
robots take orders in restaurants. ② Others make coffee
at cafés. ③ Coffee beans are grown in warm areas. ④ They also work as guides at airports. Robots are all
around us.
choices: ① Some robots take orders in restaurants.
② Others make coffee at cafés.
③ Coffee beans are grown in warm areas.
④ They also work as guides at airports.
questions.passage: These days, robots play many different roles. ① Some robots take orders in restaurants. ② Others make coffee at cafés. 3 Coffee beans are grown in warm areas. ④ They also work as guides at airports. Robots are all around us.

questions.question:
다음 글에서 밑줄 친 them이 가리키는 것으로 가장 적절한
것은?
Imagine mosquitoes are flying around in your room. What would you do? Tomatoes can help. Many people like
tomatoes, but mosquitoes dislike them. Bowls of crushed
tomatoes can keep these insects away from your room.
questions.passage: Imagine mosquitoes are flying around in your room. What would you do? Tomatoes can help. Many people like tomatoes, but mosquitoes dislike them. Bowls of crushed tomatoes can keep these insects away from your room.

questions.question:
극장에서 지켜야 할 사항으로 언급되지 않은 것은?
Theater Rules
◦ Don’t take pictures.
◦ Don’t make loud noises.
◦ Don’t kick the seat in front of you.
choices: ④ 앞 좌석 발로 차지 않기

questions.question:
다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
Using mobile phones too much can have harmful effects. For example, it can cause dry eyes. Also, you can get
neck pains. It is important to know these negative effects.
questions.passage: Using mobile phones too much can have harmful effects. For example, it can cause dry eyes. Also, you can get neck pains. It is important to know these negative effects.

questions.question:
다음 글을 쓴 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Hi, Steve. This is Bill. There is a student debate this
Friday. However, one of our team members caught a
bad cold, so he cannot come to the debate. Can you help
us and join our team? We hope to hear from you soon.
questions.passage:
Hi, Steve. This is Bill. There is a student debate this
Friday. However, one of our team members caught a
bad cold, so he cannot come to the debate. Can you help
us and join our team? We hope to hear from you soon.

questions.question:
다음 글의 바로 뒤에 이어질 내용으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Living in another country is not always easy. I have
been living in Mexico for three years. Since my family
moved here, 	I 	have found many cultural 	differences
between Mexico and Korea. Here are some examples
that I want to share with you.
choices: ② 한국에 남아 있는 가족의 소식
③ 1년 전 한국으로 이사를 한 이유
④ 멕시코와 한국의 문화적 차이 사례
questions.passage:
Living in another country is not always easy. I have
been living in Mexico for three years. Since my family
moved here, I have found many cultural differences
between Mexico and Korea. Here are some examples
that I want to share with you.
